reviews.review_description: Had a major glitch on me on the very, very beginning of the tutorial ￼as soon as it asked me to grab the cardboard box I grabbed the box then it suddenly has me jump in the air and makes me drop the box never could get past that one point of the game so again I never even gotten to play the game ￼

reviews.review_title: One big glitch, never been able to play
reviews.review_description: I've never been able to check customers out. For some reason, it's been so long ago, I couldn't get a refund and I didn't feel like arguing about it. I've never been able to do anything. I think when games are abandoned with major bugs they should have to refund everyone. It happens too often. It's not fair.
It doesn't look or play the way it supposed to, glitchy and is like a mobile game that looks good and is different 🤢🤮

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear you didn’t enjoy the game. We’re aware of the current issues and are working to improve performance and polish. Thanks for your feedback — it helps us make the game better.

— Superstore Simulator Team

reviews.review_description: I couldn’t bend down to pick up the starting box and couldn’t start awful

developer_response.body:
Hello James, 
We are sorry for your experience. Would you please let us know your issue in detail at examobgames@gmail.com. We'd love to assist you.

reviews.review_description:
Follow the tutorial and then your day never ends and you’re stuck unable to inbox any new products. 

Definely has some issues.  Uninstalled it once and retried with same experience.  Giving 3 stars for concept but come on devs let’s make it playable.

developer_response.body: We are very sorry to see this problem. we are going to update the game soon with resolving the problems and more engaging gameplay. Thank you for your feedback. We'll surely let you know once the updated game is live.

reviews.review_description: It's ok. I don't like the purple glitch of the box. It bothers me. You should fix the glitches in the game. You should also a choice whether if the player wants to physically bend down or reach to pick up the item or to press the trigger button to auto pick up items

developer_response.body: Dear Player, We are please to let you know that we have recently released a new update of Superstore Simulator. Please Check it out. We have improved a lot. Thank you for your patience with us. Keep Rocking At Your Store.
